description: DeleteConfirmModal.handleConfirm dispatches the confirm command but does not set local visible=false and does not call onClose, while handleCancel does both. Modal close on confirm relies entirely on FeedList.svelte:100-105 receiving a follow-up DomainSnapshotReceived snapshot (with NoteFileDeleted cause and activeDeleteModalNoteId=null) to unmount the modal. Between the dispatch and the snapshot arrival, the modal stays interactive — the user can rapid-press the confirm button again before the IPC round-trip completes. There is no in-flight guard. The DOM tests at DeleteConfirmModal.dom.vitest.ts:160-189 only assert that a single click results in a single dispatch call; they do not assert in-flight idempotence.
recommendation: Add an in-flight guard or set visible=false after dispatch (or disable the button). At minimum, add a DOM assertion that a second rapid click does not produce a second dispatch.
